These predictors enable risk stratification even without definitive predictive algorithms due to their consistent correlation with morbidity and mortality trends observed across studies.\boxed{\text{A}} The provided information supports this conclusion through multiple sources indicating a strong link between observable clinical parameters and patient outcomes during ARDS episodes in childhood cancer cases.
